privileged_info_summary: The docker_container_formalization task creates three manually-configured production containers (acme-frontend, acme-api, acme-cron) that the agent must reverse-engineer into Dockerfiles. acme-frontend is based on nginx:1.24-alpine with manual additions of curl, custom HTML dashboard content, and nginx health endpoint configuration. acme-api is based on python:3.11-slim with manually installed Flask, Gunicorn, and requests packages, hosting a JSON API with /api/status and /api/products endpoints returning JSON with service version 1.0.1. acme-cron is based on alpine:3.18 with manually installed bash, curl, and jq tools, a healthcheck.sh script, and config.json file. The task requires creating reproducible Dockerfiles in /home/ga/projects/reproducible-images/{frontend,api,cron}/, building images tagged as acme-{name}:reproducible, and writing a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/container_audit.txt. The user is 'ga'. The data is entirely synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh from standard Docker images.
